298 I1K I1K_OTH_CARDIO_DIS (I1K) Other Cardiovascular Disease CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - heart/circulation - other cardiovascular disease. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
